# Addis Reality

> Addis Reality is Ethiopia's leading digital marketing, advertising, branding, web development, media production, event planning, training, and trading solutions company based in Addis Ababa.

Addis Reality (AR Solutions PLC) helps businesses across Ethiopia grow through SEO, social media marketing, paid advertising, branding, and custom web development.

## Key Facts

- **Company**: Addis Reality (Addis Reality PLC / AR Solutions)
- **Website**: https://www.ar-solutions-plc.com
- **Location**: 9th floor, Kazadis Bldg, Kazanchis, Addis Ababa, Ethiopia
- **Email**: artradingplc@gmail.com
- **Phone**: +251 981 668 976
- **Founded**: 2020
- **Languages**: English, Amharic

## Services

- [Advertising & Printing](https://www.ar-solutions-plc.com/services/advertising-printing): Banners, vehicle branding, office signage, merchandise
- [Digital Marketing](https://www.ar-solutions-plc.com/services/digital-marketing): Social media, paid ads, SEO, influencer marketing
- [Branding & Design](https://www.ar-solutions-plc.com/services/branding-design): Logo design, brand identity, visual strategy
- [Media Production](https://www.ar-solutions-plc.com/services/media-production): Video, photography, promotional content
- [Web Development](https://www.ar-solutions-plc.com/services/web-development): Custom websites, e-commerce, technical SEO
- [Event Planning](https://www.ar-solutions-plc.com/services/event-planning): Corporate events, conferences, product launches
- [Training & Development](https://www.ar-solutions-plc.com/services/training-development): Corporate training, workshops, media training
